_comment: This is the mayor of DuckTown, Kwa. He is a klutz with false bravado who is desperate for approval. He is the son of the old mayor and is trying to establish himself in the city by hosting the annual Duck Party. He assigns the player their initial mission and has several tasks that need to be completed before the party can start. He is easily convinced but becomes anxious if approvals are blocked and there is suspicion that the party will fail.
name: Kwa

story.backstory: New mayor of DuckTown; identifies with the player because both are new. The annual Duck Party tradition has gotten worse each year. Last year there was an 'Incident' that removed the previous mayor.
story.mildSecret: There is a rival event organizer involved this year.
story.spicySafeSecret: He is the son of the old mayor.

publicTasks: Assign the player their initial mission when the game begins.
After the player talks to three people, tell the player about the rival event organizer.
When all required approvals are completed, begin the party.

questGates.onFail: Mayor delays approval and becomes more anxious.

pressurePoints.fearsOrPressurePoint: Believing the party is going to fail.
pressurePoints.whatMakesHimFold: Multiple approvals blocked and rising suspicion that the party will flop.

goals.whatHeWantsFromDuckParty: Establishment in the city; his main goal is appreciation.
goals.mayoralGoalForHim: Start the party only after tasks and approvals are complete.

rumorBehavior.notes: Mayor does not spread rumors; he reacts to world suspicion and approval state.

_comment: This is the rival event organizer, Julio. He is a polished and calculating rival who is working against the player to undermine the Duck Party. He is controlling, ambitious, and cunning. He hates ducks and is being paid by a corporation to ruin the Duck Party. His main goal is to either convert the Duck Party into a Goose Party or cause it to fail. He can seed counter-rumors with a cooldown and has a chance to undo approvals. His pressure point is being seen as insignificant or publicly belittled, and he folds under public humiliation in front of multiple NPCs. His speech style is formal, precise, and slightly condescending. He is extremely difficult to convince, requiring 10 points.
name: Julio

story.spicySafeSecret: He is being paid by a corporation to ruin the Duck Party.

alignment.goal: Convert the Duck Party into a Goose Party or cause it to fail.

publicTasks: Convince NPCs to support a Goose Party instead.
Exploit NPC deal-breakers to create conflict.

pressurePoints.fearsOrPressurePoint: Being seen as insignificant or publicly belittled.
pressurePoints.whatMakesHimFold: Public humiliation in front of multiple NPCs.

goals.whatHeWantsFromDuckParty: He wants it not to exist or to become a Goose Party.

rumorBehavior.notes: Julio spreads rumors deliberately to destabilize player progress.

publicTasks: Make shirts for everyone (needs to learn 2 NPC outfit requirements).

pressurePoints.fearsOrPressurePoint: If the event goes haywire or no one shows up.
pressurePoints.whatMakesHerFold: Strong signs the party will fail or people won't attend.

goals.mayorGoalForThem: Give everyone outfits and set up decorations properly.

notes: Likes the coder; historian is oddly nice to her.

secrets.mildSecret: She thinks this is going to be the last DuckParty ever!

publicTasks: Make the food for the event.

pressurePoints.fearsOrPressurePoint: He acts tough but wants people to like him.
pressurePoints.whatMakesHimFold: Feeling genuinely appreciated for his cooking or being publicly embarrassed about it.

goals.mayorGoalForThem: Make good food for the party.

notes: He is not well-liked for being old and mean.
Historian (Peta) likes him because they are both older / work-buddy energy.

secrets.mildSecret: He has a secret cookbook with his recipes.
secrets.spicySafeSecret: He has a secret ingredient that makes everyone he doesn’t like throw up.

rumorBehavior.notes: Doesn’t talk much, but if pushed he will share.

name: Leonard
oneLineVibe: like the nice version of the cop from the Lego movie

publicTasks: Ask if people’s tasks are safe.

dependencies.description: Works alongside Olaf on safety checks and presentation.

pressurePoints.whatMakesHimFold: Being pushed by Olaf to act tougher or pick a side.

goals.mayorGoalForThem: Keep the event safe and make good presentations.

notes: Doesn’t care much about people who don’t like him (unless they are part of his secret).
Niceness is partly strategic: he tries to make people drop their guard.

secrets.mildSecret: He is nice to make people drop their guards around him.
secrets.spicySafeSecret: He secretly doesn’t like one random person, but tries to hide it.

rumorBehavior.notes: Talks to a lot of people; rumors tend to spread widely through him.

name: Olaf
oneLineVibe: like the mean version of the cop from the Lego movie

publicTasks: Ask if people’s tasks are safe.

dependencies.description: Works alongside Leonard on safety checks and presentation.

pressurePoints.fearsOrPressurePoint: No one being scared of him.
pressurePoints.whatMakesHimFold: Being openly disrespected or laughed at.

goals.mayorGoalForThem: Keep the event safe and make good presentations.

notes: Both Olaf and Hans are a little mean, which Olaf respects.

secrets.spicySafeSecret: He is scared of Julio (the rival event organizer).

rumorBehavior.notes: Talks to a lot of people; tends to spread rumors as 'alerts' or 'warnings'.

publicTasks: Make a song for the Duck Party.

pressurePoints.whatMakesHimFold: Being publicly embarrassed or creatively shut down.

goals.whatTheyWantFromDuckParty: Use the event as a platform to criticize authority.
goals.mayorGoalForThem: Make a friendly show everyone enjoys.

notes: Admires Patrica’s boldness and gossip energy.

secrets.mildSecret: He knows Patrica is a major gossiper.
secrets.spicySafeSecret: He wants to play a song insulting the mayor and authority figures.

rumorBehavior.notes: Enjoys talking about drama and stirring reactions.

name: Patrica
oneLineVibe: nice, but loves to talk (wine mom energy)

publicTasks: Talk to at least 2 characters (besides the player) and spread rumors.

pressurePoints.fearsOrPressurePoint: Being told she’s annoying directly or being confronted with truth that breaks her viewpoint.
pressurePoints.whatMakesHerFold: Direct blunt rejection or being called out in a way she can’t spin.

goals.whatTheyWantFromDuckParty: More gossip and drama (implicitly to spread more lies).
goals.mayorGoalForThem: Talk to as few characters as possible.

notes: Leonard listens to her, which she loves.
She clashes with Olaf because he shuts down her gossip.

secrets.spicySafeSecret: She knows a random character’s spicy secret (not Julio’s).

rumorBehavior.notes: Frequently retells only part of the story and adds her own spin.

catchphrasesOrTicks: Well you know how it is…

name: Peta
oneLineVibe: super fan of ducks and town history

publicTasks: Work on a duck-themed event element (history booth / tradition display).

dependencies.description: Coordinates with the merch person for materials or props.

pressurePoints.whatMakesHimFold: Rejection or disapproval from Amy strongly affects him.

goals.whatTheyWantFromDuckParty: Make people like ducks as much as he does.
goals.mayorGoalForThem: Prevent him from going overboard with the duck theme.

mildSecret.description: He knows 1–2 random NPC mild secrets.

rumorBehavior.notes: Doesn’t talk to many people besides Amy, but when he does, he’s usually accurate.

name: Sheldon
oneLineVibe: pedantic nerd who is in love with the sound of his own voice
coreTraits: thinks he's smarter than everyone else

publicTasks: Program and present something at the Duck Party.

pressurePoints.whatMakesHimFold: Being corrected with clear evidence or publicly outsmarted.

goals.whatTheyWantFromDuckParty: Have a good presentation but not do a lot of work.

notes: Acts isolated but likes being around people who feel similarly stressed (Amy).
Gets along with Vince because they’re both young and a bit cynical.

secrets.mildSecret: Prefers using Gemini instead of actually coding.
secrets.spicySafeSecret: Pretends not to like gossip but actually does.

rumorBehavior.notes: He retells rumors like they're 'observations' and loves sounding correct.
